input: user historical and current sessions (click sequences) and item attribute graphs
output: ranked list of travel packages for next click prediction
backbone: multi-view variational graph auto-encoder + personalized GNN
loss: variational lower bound (ELBO) + recommendation loss (cross-entropy or BPR)
key_idea: jointly learn item representations from co-occurrence attribute graphs via multi-view VGAE and user representations from sessions via personalized GNN with gated fusion of historical and current sessions
datasets: real-life tourism e-commerce dataset from China
